data.name: CommitRequiresCommentTitle
data.value: Commit() needs a comment to justify its existence

data.name: CommitRequiresCommentMessageFormat
data.value: Commit() needs a comment to justify its existence. Add a leading or trailing comment explaining why it is required.

data.name: CommitRequiresCommentDescription
data.value: Calling Commit() manually interrupts the default transactional behavior of Business Central by persisting changes earlier than the platform would normally allow. Although there are valid use cases, the reason cannot be inferred from the code itself. A leading or trailing comment is required to document why the commit is necessary.

data.name: EmptyStatementRequiresCommentTitle
data.value: Empty statements should be removed or documented

data.name: EmptyStatementRequiresCommentMessageFormat
data.value: Empty statements should be removed or have a leading or trailing comment explaining why it is intentionally empty.

data.name: EmptyStatementRequiresCommentDescription
data.value: Empty statements (standalone ;) reduce readability and are commonly introduced by mistake. This rule flags empty statement expressions (excess semicolons) so they can be removed.

data.name: PublicProcedureRequiresDocumentationTitle
data.value: Public procedures must include XML documentation comments

data.name: PublicProcedureRequiresDocumentationMessageFormat
data.value: Public procedure '{0}' must include XML documentation comments (or be restricted to local or internal scope).

data.name: PublicProcedureRequiresDocumentationDescription
data.value: Public procedures are part of the exposed API and must be explicitly documented to justify their availability. XML documentation comments communicate intent, usage, and guarantees to consumers of the extension.

data.name: WriteToFlowFieldRequiresCommentTitle
data.value: Writing to FlowFields is not common and requires an explanatory comment

data.name: WriteToFlowFieldRequiresCommentMessageFormat
data.value: Writing to a FlowField is not common and requires a comment explaining why this assignment is intentional.

data.name: WriteToFlowFieldRequiresCommentDescription
data.value: FlowFields are calculated fields and are not intended to be written to. Writing to a FlowField, whether accidental or intentional, can lead to runtime errors.

data.name: XmlDocumentationProcedureConsistencyTitle
data.value: XML documentation must match the procedure signature

data.name: XmlDocumentationProcedureConsistencyMessageFormat
data.value: The XML documentation does not match the procedure signature.

data.name: XmlDocumentationProcedureConsistencyDescription
data.value: The XML documentation for a procedure must accurately reflect its signature.

data.name: InternalProcedureRequiresDocumentationTitle
data.value: Internal procedures must include XML documentation comments

data.name: InternalProcedureRequiresDocumentationMessageFormat
data.value: Internal procedure '{0}' must include XML documentation comments (or be restricted to local scope).

data.name: InternalProcedureRequiresDocumentationDescription
data.value: Internal procedures can be part of the exposed API (internalsVisibleTo) and should be explicitly documented to justify their availability. XML documentation comments communicate intent, usage, and guarantees to consumers of the extension.

data.name: PublicObjectRequiresDocumentationTitle
data.value: Public objects must include XML documentation comments

data.name: PublicObjectRequiresDocumentationMessageFormat
data.value: Public object '{0}' must include XML documentation comments.

data.name: PublicObjectRequiresDocumentationDescription
data.value: Public objects are part of the exposed API and must be explicitly documented to justify their availability. XML documentation comments communicate intent, usage, and guarantees to consumers of the extension.

data.name: InternalObjectRequiresDocumentationTitle
data.value: Internal objects must include XML documentation comments

data.name: InternalObjectRequiresDocumentationMessageFormat
data.value: Internal object '{0}' must include XML documentation comments.

data.name: InternalObjectRequiresDocumentationDescription
data.value: Internal objects can be part of the exposed API (internalsVisibleTo) and should be explicitly documented to justify their availability. XML documentation comments communicate intent, usage, and guarantees to consumers of the extension.

data.name: EventRequiresDocumentationTitle
data.value: An integration or business event must include XML documentation comments

data.name: EventRequiresDocumentationMessageFormat
data.value: Event '{0}' must include XML documentation comments.

data.name: EventRequiresDocumentationDescription
data.value: Integration events and business events are part of the exposed API and must be explicitly documented to justify their availability. XML documentation comments communicate intent, usage, and guarantees to consumers of the extension.

data.name: InternalEventRequiresDocumentationTitle
data.value: Internal event must include XML documentation comments

data.name: InternalEventRequiresDocumentationMessageFormat
data.value: Internal event '{0}' must include XML documentation comments.

data.name: InternalEventRequiresDocumentationDescription
data.value: Internal events can be part of the exposed API (internalsVisibleTo) and should be explicitly documented to justify their availability. XML documentation comments communicate intent, usage, and guarantees to consumers of the extension.

data.name: AnalyzerExceptionTitle
data.value: Analyzer threw an unhandled exception

data.name: AnalyzerExceptionMessageFormat
data.value: Analyzer '{0}' threw an exception of type '{1}': {2}

data.name: AnalyzerExceptionDescription
data.value: An ALCops analyzer threw an unhandled exception while analyzing this object. This is a defect in the analyzer, not in the analyzed code. The diagnostic is reported at the object or line being analyzed (instead of the generic AD0001 on app.json) so the culprit can be located. Please report it to the ALCops maintainers with the object name and exception details.
